attached_docs: Pasted text(40).txt — KFM GitHub Repository Documentation Implementation Agent v3.1

validation_gates.reason: Verified the current default-branch base, target file and blob, canonical ADR template and README, issue-intake boundary, CODEOWNERS routing, generated-receipt schema, and absence of overlapping open ADR-template work.

Preserved the prior status, context, decision, evidence, Directory Rules, consequences, alternatives, validation, rollback, sensitivity, companion-artifact, contract-version, open-question, and reference obligations while adding canonical identity, migration, supersession, scope, affected-surface, acceptance, and review fields.
Parsed the YAML front matter; verified required keys, balanced HTML comments, final newline, ordered section inventory, existing label preservation, and assignment to the verified repository owner.

The issue is explicitly non-authoritative, routes security-sensitive content to SECURITY.md, prohibits restricted or exact-sensitive payloads, and separates issue closure from ADR acceptance, release, and publication.
Computed SHA-256 9b8ecc172e261af2e6f9ef0755f13b5605d15a98a640d2e58c4de0b066c50a75 and Git blob SHA 9c4c44ab57c05903f76d1439504053de9e96e014 for the final issue template.
The existing adr and adr-proposed labels were preserved, but live label existence and issue-chooser rendering are not exposed by the selected connector flow and remain NEEDS VERIFICATION.

The GitHub contents API returned blob SHA 9c4c44ab57c05903f76d1439504053de9e96e014, matching the computed Git blob SHA; SHA-256 recomputed as 9b8ecc172e261af2e6f9ef0755f13b5605d15a98a640d2e58c4de0b066c50a75. Remote diff verification will be repeated after the receipt commit.

notes: AI-authored revision of the public ADR issue-intake template on a scoped review branch. The artifact structures proposals and routing only; it does not accept an ADR, reserve an ID conclusively, prove label existence, create a ReviewRecord, authorize implementation, approve release, or grant publication authority. Human review remains pending.
